name: dev.whiteintel/mcp-server
description: Corporate & offshore ownership intelligence for AI agents — search ~59.6M entities, screen sanctions (OFAC/EU/UN/UK), trace ownership chains to the ultimate beneficial owner, and buy fully-cited dossiers in-flow. Freemium: anonymous free tier; wi_ API key lifts limits.

environment_variables.name: WHITEINTEL_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional wi_ API key (whiteintel.dev → Settings → API keys). Lifts free-tier limits to your plan.
